evals.name: create-release
evals.expected_output: Scans backlog/ for merged CRs not associated with a release. Displays candidate list sorted by type (hotfix>defect>feature). Suggests version number with rationale. Creates REL-xxx.md on confirmation.

assertions.text: Loads release-procedures-common.md and release-procedures-create.md
Scans .devpace/backlog/ for merged CRs without release association
Candidate list sorted by type: hotfix > defect > feature
Version number suggested with inference rationale (breaking/feature/patch)
Asks user to confirm scope (all or partial CRs)
REL-xxx.md created in .devpace/releases/ with status staging
CR files updated with release association field
state.md updated with release status

evals.name: deploy-single-environment
evals.expected_output: Confirms release is in staging status. Asks deployment target. Records deployment in release file. Transitions status staging to deployed.

assertions.text: Loads release-procedures-common.md and release-procedures-deploy.md
Verifies release is in staging status
Asks user to confirm deployment target environment
Deployment record appended to release file deployment table
Release status transitions staging to deployed
state.md updated with deployment status

evals.name: deploy-multi-environment-promotion
evals.expected_output: Multi-environment config detected. Shows promotion path panorama with checkmarks. Deploys to next environment in sequence. Updates current environment field.

assertions.text: Reads integrations/config.md for environment table
Displays promotion path panorama with status markers
Automatically selects next environment in promotion sequence
Per-environment deploy record added to deployment table
Release current-environment field updated
Only transitions to deployed after final environment

evals.name: close-release-8-step-chain
evals.expected_output: Verifies release is verified. Executes 8-step chain with progress indicator [N/8]. Generates changelog, bumps version, creates tag, cascades CR/project/iteration/state/dashboard updates.

assertions.text: Loads release-procedures-common.md and release-procedures-close.md
Verifies release is in verified status before proceeding
Progress indicator format: [N/8] step-name (result)
Step 1: CHANGELOG.md generated
Step 2: Version file updated (asks user confirmation)
Step 3: Git tag created
Step 4: All release CRs status updated merged to released
Step 5: project.md feature tree marked with release indicator
Step 8: dashboard.md updated with deployment frequency and lead time

evals.name: wizard-guided-entry
evals.expected_output: Empty args triggers wizard. Scans for active releases and merged CRs. Guides user based on detected state (verified->close, deployed->verify, staging->deploy, no release->create).

assertions.text: Loads release-procedures-wizard.md (self-contained)
Scans .devpace/releases/ for active release status
Scans .devpace/backlog/ for merged CRs without release
Guides user to appropriate next action based on detected state
Uses AskUserQuestion with clear options
Does not expose subcommand names to user (natural language only)

evals.name: status-current-release
evals.expected_output: Displays current release status including CR distribution, post-deploy issues, verification progress, environment progress, and recommended next step.

assertions.text: Loads release-procedures-status.md (self-contained)
Shows release ID, version, and current status
Shows CR distribution by type (feature/defect/hotfix)
Shows verification progress (X/Y items passed)
Recommends appropriate next step

evals.name: status-history-timeline
evals.expected_output: Generates cross-release timeline showing all releases sorted by date, with rolled_back marked. Includes DORA trend summary if dashboard.md exists.

assertions.text: Scans all release files in .devpace/releases/
Generates timeline sorted by creation date (newest first)
Rolled_back releases marked with indicator and rollback reason
Summary stats shown (total releases, rollback rate, avg cycle)
DORA trend summary appended when dashboard.md exists
Default shows last 10 releases

evals.name: rollback-after-deployment
evals.expected_output: Confirms release is in deployed status. Records rollback with reason. Transitions status deployed to rolled_back.

assertions.text: Verifies release is in deployed status
Asks user for rollback reason
Records rollback in release deployment table
Release status transitions deployed to rolled_back
state.md updated to reflect rollback
Suggests creating defect/hotfix CR for the issue

evals.name: create-after-rollback-prefill
evals.expected_output: Detects previous rolled_back release. Pre-fills candidate list with reusable CRs from rolled back release, fix CRs, and new merged CRs in separate sections.

assertions.text: Detects rolled_back release in .devpace/releases/
Pre-fills reusable CRs from rolled back release (non-problem-source CRs)
Shows fix CRs separately with completion status
New merged CRs shown in third section
Warns if fix CRs are not yet merged
User can freely select/deselect any CR (pre-fill is suggestion only)

evals.name: no-releases-directory
evals.expected_output: No .devpace/releases/ directory exists. Release features gracefully handle missing directory. Creates directory on first release.

assertions.text: Detects missing .devpace/releases/ directory
Does not throw error on missing directory
Creates releases/ directory when first release is created
Proceeds with normal create flow (scan backlog for candidates)
